REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-29-2001 IN DEPT. 622 - COURT TRIAL HELD. DEFAULT PROVE UP HEARING. JUDGMENT ENTERED ON 10/29/01 IN FAVOR OF PLTF. J. CONWAY, JUDGE; K. PEEK, CLERK; JANET POND, CSR.
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON OCT-29-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, JURY DEMAND STRICKEN; N/A BY DEFT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.

JCONWAY, JUDGE; KPEEK, CLERK; JPOND, CSR. GUY WILSON FOR PLTF; NO APPEARANCE BY RESP. MATTER ASSIGNED FROM DEPT 206 FOR DEFAULT HEARING. WITNESSES SWORN, EXHIBITS MARKED. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES AND RENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $4222.11 PLUS COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED. JUDGMENT SIGNED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHEL, ANGELA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1471 - 48TH AVE, APT #3, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,222.11 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,222.11, LEASE FORFEITED
